entry.title: Payment Link for Video Editors: Send a Link, Get Paid

link.title: Payment Link for Video Editors: Send a Link, Get Paid

entry.content:
Payment link for Video Editors: send a link, get paid

If you deliver digital work, a payment link is often faster than an invoice. It turns payment into a single click instead of a process.

When a payment link makes sense

  • After a deliverable handoff
  • At a project milestone
  • At the end of a weekly/monthly cycle

Example use cases for Video Editors

  • YouTube edit (1–4 videos)
  • Revisions / versioning
  • Podcast clips package
  • Deliverables handoff (exports + thumbnails)

How to use a payment link workflow

  1. Finish the work
  2. Create a payment request
  3. Send the payment link
  4. Get paid

Using Gitpay

Gitpay helps you create payment requests and share payment links:

  • https://gitpay.me

CTA

Send a payment link and get paid faster: https://gitpay.me
entry.summary: Payment link for Video Editors: send a link, get paid

If you deliver digital work, a payment link is often faster than an invoice. It turns payment into a single click instead of a process.

When a payment link makes sense

  • After a deliverable handoff
  • At a project milestone
  • At the end of a weekly/monthly cycle

Example use cases for UI Designers
